about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A passionate software engineer building systems that make a difference.
about.summary: Software Engineer specializing in backend and AI systems, with experience designing scalable, microservices-oriented architectures and integrating LLMs into production workflows. Strong background in Django-based platforms, multi-tenant systems, and audit-safe business processes. Experienced with Agile delivery, cloud-native concepts, and building systems that serve real users with measurable impact.
about.mission: My mission is to leverage technology to solve real-world problems, building systems that are not only technically sound but also deliver measurable business value.

highlights: Led the design of the core product backend, building scalable REST APIs (Django/PostgreSQL) that serve 100+ active users with backward-compatible versioning.
Modeled complex business workflows with strict audit trails and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), reducing manual processing time by 40%.
Implemented Django Channels and WebSockets to handle thousands of monthly events and real-time notifications.
Championed AI-assisted pipelines, including prompt templates, validation guardrails for AI-generated code, and automated suggestion features.
Introduced structured logging, rate limiting, and standard error-handling patterns to improve system observability and stability under load.
Led end-to-end architecture and delivery for client-facing web products, managing the lifecycle from UI/UX mockups to deployment.
Delivered custom WordPress solutions and full-stack web applications, owning hosting configurations and SEO optimizations.
Implemented developer-friendly Git workflows, testing protocols, and CI practices to reduce delivery friction and improve code quality.
Built workflow management applications to automate internal processes, utilizing Node.js and Firebase for the backend.
Developed responsive frontends using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, ensuring cross-device compatibility.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work showcasing system design and AI engineering.

aiAssistant.title: AI Business Assistant — RAG Prototype
aiAssistant.description: Architected a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using Django and LangChain to enable semantic search over business documents.
aiAssistant.content:
## Overview

This project involved building a production-grade RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system that enables semantic search over business documents using natural language queries.

## Key Features

- **Semantic Search**: Leveraged LangChain chains and retrievers for intelligent document retrieval
- **Vector Storage**: Implemented Chroma vector store for efficient similarity search
- **Human-in-the-Loop**: Designed approval workflows for AI-generated actions
- **Safety First**: Implemented output validation, confidence scoring, and prompt versioning to mitigate hallucinations

## Tech Stack

- Django / Python
- LangChain (Chains, Retrievers)
- Chroma Vector Database
- OpenAI API
- Prompt Engineering & Guardrails

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant Sales & Sample Distribution
multiTenant.description: Designed a multi-tenant system to calculate sample quotas based on historical sales data and product rules.
multiTenant.content:
## Overview

Designed and implemented a multi-tenant system for calculating sample quotas based on historical sales data and product-specific rules.

## Key Features

- **Tenant Isolation**: Complete data isolation between tenants with shared infrastructure
- **Quota Calculation**: Algorithm-driven sample quota computation based on historical data
- **Proposal APIs**: RESTful APIs for managing distribution proposals
- **Audit Compliance**: Comprehensive audit logs for data integrity and compliance

## Tech Stack

- Django / Python
- PostgreSQL
- REST API Design
- Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
- Multi-tenancy Architecture
